clause_ref: ISO 19650-2:2018 — Delivery phase of the assets
_note: Part 2 specifies the process for managing collaborative production of information during the asset delivery phase.

process_stages.2_invitation_to_tender: EIR issued; lead appointed party invited to tender
process_stages.3_tender_response: Lead appointed party submits BEP + capability statements
process_stages.6_collaborative_production: Information containers produced + shared through CDE
process_stages.7_information_model_delivery: PIM delivered to appointing party for AIM transition

delivery_roles.information_management: Defined in BEP — typically held by lead appointed party

deliverables.BEP: BIM Execution Plan — pre-appointment + post-appointment versions
deliverables.TIDP: Task Information Delivery Plan per task team
deliverables.responsibility_matrix: Who is responsible for what information
